title: Manage your visa and passport :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Manage your visa and passport
Learn how to renew or transfer visas, report missing passports, get a citizen endorsement, and what happens if your visa or passport expire.
- Using eVisas and visa labels An eVisa is a visa that is issued and recorded electronically. You do not need a visa label (sticker) in your passport.

## Using eVisas and visa labels
An eVisa is a visa that is issued and recorded electronically. You do not need a visa label (sticker) in your passport.
- Get a visa sticker for a passport All visas are issued as an eVisa, but if you want a physical label (sticker) in your passport, you can apply for one after you have been given your visa.

## Get a visa sticker for a passport
All visas are issued as an eVisa, but if you want a physical label (sticker) in your passport, you can apply for one after you have been given your visa.
- Transferring a visa to a new passport If you have renewed your passport, you need to transfer your new visa into your new passport before you use it to travel. This applies for both physical visa labels and eVisas.

## Transferring a visa to a new passport
If you have renewed your passport, you need to transfer your new visa into your new passport before you use it to travel. This applies for both physical visa labels and eVisas.
- Apply for a transfer or confirmation of a visa Use this online application form for the transfer of a visa or to confirm your immigration status.

## Apply for a transfer or confirmation of a visa
Use this online application form for the transfer of a visa or to confirm your immigration status.
- Evidence of New Zealand residence The best way to prove that you have residence in New Zealand is to show an endorsement in your passport. If you do not have this information, you can ask for a letter from Immigration New Zealand.

## Evidence of New Zealand residence
The best way to prove that you have residence in New Zealand is to show an endorsement in your passport. If you do not have this information, you can ask for a letter from Immigration New Zealand.
- The Visa Verification Service You can check the details of a New Zealand visa using our online Visa Verification Service.

## The Visa Verification Service
You can check the details of a New Zealand visa using our online Visa Verification Service.
- If you cannot get a passport What to do if your passport is not recognised by Immigration New Zealand, or you are unable to get a passport.

## If you cannot get a passport
What to do if your passport is not recognised by Immigration New Zealand, or you are unable to get a passport.
- Passports we do not recognise We do not recognise passports from some countries, territories and authorities. This means that we will not issue a visa into these passports, and we will not accept these passports for travel to New Zealand.

## Passports we do not recognise
We do not recognise passports from some countries, territories and authorities. This means that we will not issue a visa into these passports, and we will not accept these passports for travel to New Zealand.
- New Zealand citizens travelling on a foreign passport If you want to travel to New Zealand as a citizen, you must have a New Zealand passport or a foreign passport with an endorsement of your New Zealand citizenship.

## New Zealand citizens travelling on a foreign passport
If you want to travel to New Zealand as a citizen, you must have a New Zealand passport or a foreign passport with an endorsement of your New Zealand citizenship.
- If your passport is lost or stolen What to do if your passport is lost, your visa expires before your passport is replaced, or you find your passport after reporting it lost.

## If your passport is lost or stolen
What to do if your passport is lost, your visa expires before your passport is replaced, or you find your passport after reporting it lost.
- Check or change your visa conditions Find out about the conditions or rules of having New Zealand visas, and what to do if you need to change your conditions.

## Check or change your visa conditions
Find out about the conditions or rules of having New Zealand visas, and what to do if you need to change your conditions.
- Changes to your circumstances If your personal situation has changed since your current visa application was approved, it is important to let us know as soon as possible and take immediate action. A change in circumstance may affect the visa you have, and there may be different pathways available to you depending on your new situation.

## Changes to your circumstances
If your personal situation has changed since your current visa application was approved, it is important to let us know as soon as possible and take immediate action. A change in circumstance may affect the visa you have, and there may be different pathways available to you depending on your new situation.
